identity.title: Jayodeed - Going Crazy (Rooklyn Mix)
identity.styleSentence: A driving G major synth-pop track at a high-energy 143.5 bpm featuring pulsating basslines and atmospheric keys that build an urgent, club-ready vibe perfect for expressing turbulent romantic obsession.
identity.vocalStyle: Confessional and breathy with dynamic intensity

lyrics.text:
You got me going crazy, crazy, crazy
You got me going crazy,
I don't know if I hate you
Or if I need you, baby
One more drink and I might call you
One more night and I might fall through
You got me going crazy,
dancing with your ghost in the room
I keep saying that I'm dumb,
but I still look for you
You got me going crazy, crazy, crazy
I pulled up late with the lights low,
still got your name in my iPhone
You say I'm poison,
I know,
but you still sip when your eyes close
We go back and forth like waves do,
I run from love but I chase you
I said I'd change,
that ain't true,
I just hate the way I crave you
You hit my line when the day's dry
I know your friends say I'm bad news
But when the night get too loud,
I'm still the one that you dance to
I'm faded,
you're dangerous,
still somehow my favorite
We break it,
then save it,
then wake up and say this
I
don't know if I hate you, or if I need you, baby
One more drink and I might call you
One more night and I might fall through
You got me going crazy,
dancing with your ghost in the room
I keep saying that I'm dumb,
but I still look for you
You got me going crazy, crazy, crazy, crazy
I should've left you on read,
should've stayed out with my friends
But the second that you text,
I forget how this ends
You know where to find me,
back where the lights bleed
Hands on my waist like you never lied to me
I hate that I miss it,
the chaos that kisses your hands on my skin
And the way that you listen,
don't say that you love me
Just show me tonight, we don't need forever
Just give me the high
Round and round, we never slow down
We burn it up, then we fall back down
You got me going crazy, I
don't know if I hate you
Or if I need you, baby
One more drink and I might call you
One more night and I might fall through
You got me going crazy,
dancing with your ghost in the room
I keep saying that I'm dumb,
but I still look for you
You got me going crazy,
crazy,
crazy,
crazy,
crazy
You say you're dumb, but you're still outside
You say you hate me, but you still reply
I should leave you where the past lies
But we light it up when the glass hides
You got a way of making wrongs feel right
You got a way of making dark look bright
I'm losing sleep, I'm losing pace
I'm losing track of all the plays
Well, we said this was the last time
And we put up at the same time
Don't call it love, it's just a dream
Don't call it love if it keeps breaking
Don't, don't call it over if we're both waiting
You got me going crazy, you got me going crazy
Round and round, we never slow down
We burn it up,
then we
fall back down
Maybe we're toxic, maybe we're honest
Maybe the problem is I still want it
Maybe we lost it
Maybe we're haunted
Maybe the truth is
You know I love you
You got me going crazy
I don't know if I hate you
Or if I need you, baby
One more drink and I might call you
One more night and I might fall through
You got me going crazy
Dancing with your ghost in the room
I keep saying that I'm dumb,
but I still look for you
You got me going crazy, crazy
You got me going crazy
Still outside if you want me
Don't tempt me
You got me going crazy

analysis.summary: This song explores a turbulent romantic obsession where toxic dynamics blur into addiction, oscillating between hatred and dependency within a chaotic nightlife setting.

sections.name: Intro
sections.emotion: Anticipation and nervous energy building a storm.

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.emotion: Conflicted urgency; the immediate onset of madness triggered by presence.

sections.name: Chorus
sections.emotion: Peak chaotic intensity; screaming desire amidst destruction.

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.emotion: Disoriented vulnerability; the haze of alcohol masking pain.

sections.name: Pre-Chorus
sections.emotion: Rising tension and rhythmic oscillation like crashing waves.

sections.name: Bridge
sections.emotion: Melancholic resignation and the cold logic of a broken cycle.

sections.name: Drop
sections.emotion: Pure sonic chaos; disintegration of self into noise.

sections.name: Outro
sections.emotion: Fading echo of obsession refusing to let go completely.

keywords.emotion: Manic instability and loss of control.
keywords.imageryPrompt: A swirling vortex of neon lights distorting a person's face, surrounded by floating shattered glass and digital glitch effects.

keywords.emotion: Burning resentment mixed with suppressed longing.
keywords.imageryPrompt: Dark smoke curling around clenched fists holding a burning rose that refuses to fade in the shadows of an alleyway.
Dry, cracked earth reaching desperately toward a single dripping faucet inside a sterile, empty concrete room.

keywords.emotion: Haunting presence of memory in the present moment.
keywords.imageryPrompt: A translucent figure dancing alone in an abandoned club with flickering strobe lights casting long, disjointed shadows.
Vibrant red liquid dripping from a cracked glass onto a black floor that instantly blooms with dark violet flowers.
A kaleidoscope of shattered mirrors reflecting different timelines, exploding outward in slow motion amidst rain.

dropMap.hint: cuts → blackout/cut-mode moments; risers → supernova build-ups (stemSense activeCut/activeRiser fire these automatically)
